name: libfile-sharedir-perl
title: libfile-sharedir-perl
summary: module to locate non-code files during run-time
description:
module to locate non-code files during run-time
The intent of File::ShareDir is to provide a companion to Class::Inspector and
File::HomeDir, modules that take a process that is well-known by advanced Perl
developers but gets a little tricky, and make it more available to the larger
Perl community.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-sharedir-perl because module to locate non-code files during run-time.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfile-sharedir-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-sharedir-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-sharedir-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
